text:
YAMANAIAME is the ending theme for the anime film, Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya.

It originally released as the 1st track on YAMANAIAME. It also appears as the 5th and final track on the original soundtrack of the film, Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya, and the 8th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics by Benjamin & mpi
Sung by Mica Caldito, mpi and Mika Kobayashi.

Musicians
Drums: YU "Masshoi" YAMAUCHI
Bass: TOSHINO TANABE
Guitars: HIROSHI IIMURO
Piano, Keyboards & All Other Instruments: 

Title

"止まない雨" (Yamanai ame) means "rain that does not stop" in Japanese.

Musical motifs

The track has 4 remixes:

ymniam-orch
EMAymniam (0:00-1:32)
ymniam-MKorch 
YAMANAIAME ＜FMv＞

Additionally, the opening ostinato (0:09-0:20), the chorus (1:01-1:25) and the bridge (3:40-4:03) are motifs used independently in 1 track:

EMAymniam (ostinato at 3:40-3:55 and 4:07-4:21, bridge at 4:24-4:50)

All occurrences

Attack on Titan Part 1: Guren no Yumiya - Ending credits
